checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~57,610 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 5% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 19 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~8,112 tokens (14% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.07–$0.86 per load ($0.36–$4.32 for a 5-page session)
257 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring
